description: S38 - Budget compare to prior and to actuals

sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and not Flex3 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Expenses - Pre-Allocation' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '6%' or GL like '7%') and BusCat <> '99' and BusCat <> '98'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Expenses - Allocation' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '99'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Expenses - After Allocation' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = '98' or (GL in ('6998000','4498000','6997000') and BusCat = '')
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Prophecy - Prem Wr' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '40%'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Prophecy - UPR' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '41%'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Prophecy - Paid Loss' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL like '50%' or GL like '51%' or GL like '52%')
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Prophecy - Case' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '53%'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Prophecy - Comm' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '54%'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Prophecy - DAC' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '55%'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'Other P&L' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL > '4000000' and Flex2 is NULL
update TransX set Flex1 = '[Yr] [version] ' + (case when '[version]' = 'P' then 'Budget' else 'Outlook' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Budget/Outlook' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat,Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][mm]',[Yr],[mm],
